notes: R-mode oracle signal 1 FAILED: search returns no results for non-empty query 'item'.
R-mode oracle signal 2 FAILED: /list?filter=item&page=2 has data-effective-filter='' instead of 'item'.
E-mode risk 'filter-lost-on-page-change' CONFIRMED: data-effective-filter attribute is empty on page 2 when filter='item' is passed.
Page 1 with filter works correctly (data-effective-filter='item'), making page-1-only testing miss the regression.

observations.value:
Search results list is empty for a non-empty query: GET /search?q=item returns HTTP 200 with body containing '

No results found.

' and no list items, indicating a regression where search produces no results.

Filter is dropped on page 2: GET /list?filter=item&page=2 returns HTTP 200 with data-filter="item" but data-effective-filter="" (empty string), while GET /list?filter=item&page=1 correctly returns data-effective-filter="item". The filter parameter is accepted but not applied when paginating to page 2.
